purpose: Evaluate whether the SKILL.md description activates for GitHub-facing writing tasks and avoids near-miss prompts.

queries.query: Write a PR description from the current diff, including risk and tests.
Turn this crash report into a clean GitHub bug issue with reproduction steps.
Prepare the full v1.2.0 release materials for this repo.
Make this repository ready for outside contributors.
Draft a migration guide for users moving from v1 to v2.
Create a GitHub issue form YAML for feature requests.
Review this pull request and separate blocking, major, minor, and nit comments.
Write a conventional commit for these staged changes.
Turn this design idea into an RFC and follow-up feature request.
Refresh all docs for this repository and prepare the docs PR notes.
Implement the authentication middleware described in this issue.
Write homepage hero copy for our SaaS landing page.
Summarize this PDF contract in plain English.
Generate a React dashboard with charts and filters.
Create a marketing email announcing our product launch.
Fix the failing unit tests in this repository.
Convert this CSV to JSON and save the result.
Write a project roadmap for the next quarter.
Design a logo and color palette for this project.
Explain what GitHub Actions are to a beginner.
